registration.note: No documented public API to register webhooks programmatically.

signing.note: Secret is shown ONCE at webhook creation. Store immediately. Signature is computed over the exact raw request body (no whitespace normalization).

transport.timeout: Receiver must respond 2xx within ~5 seconds. Slow responses cause aggressive retry + eventual webhook suspension.

notes: Huntress wraps all events in an envelope with 'event_type' + 'sent_at' + 'payload'.
The 'payload' object mirrors the corresponding REST resource (incident_report, agent, etc.).
Incident reports are the critical event for MSPs doing MDR → PSA ticket creation.
